case_title: PATEL, R. et al vs. HANLUN, RONALD et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HANLUN, RONALD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1541 CALIFORNIA ST, #34, STAYED UNTIL JAN-03-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE, BUT NO EVICTION UNTIL AFTER 1/3/95 AT 5PM; IF DEFT. COMPLIES WITH AGREEMENT PLTF. WAIVES BACK RENT AND DAMAGES; IF DEFT. DOES NOT COMPLY, PLTF. WILL HAVE A TOTAL JUDGMENT OF $1423.12; (SEE FILE FOR DETAILS).
